  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Control wiring installed in the same raceway as VFD power conductors, causing electromagnetic interference (EMI) and violating manufacturer installation requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate and reroute the control wiring into a separate, dedicated conduit or use shielded cabling with proper physical separation as specified by the manufacturer."
  ],
  "rationale": "VFD manufacturer manuals strictly prohibit routing sensitive control/signal wiring in the same raceway as high-frequency, high-voltage output power conductors due to the high risk of induced electrical noise (EMI) disrupting control signals. This also violates NEC 300.3(C) and NEC 430 provisions regarding conductor separation and class circuits.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 300.3(C)",
    "NEC 725.136",
    "VFD Manufacturer Installation Manual (Wiring Separation Guidelines)"
  ]
}
